gallery.tagline: Interactive protocol visualizations for network engineers, students, and anyone curious about what happens on the wire.
gallery.aboutDescription: ProtoViz is an open-source platform for creating, sharing, and interactively exploring protocol exchange scenarios. Each scenario is a YAML file describing a complete protocol interaction — with every frame field annotated with spec references and Linux kernel source cross-links.
gallery.disclaimer: Protocol descriptions are based on open-source implementations (Linux kernel, rdma-core) and public RFCs. Specification references are citations for further reading — no proprietary text has been reproduced.

viewer.detailPanelSeparate: Detail panel is in a separate window — click to focus
viewer.detailPanelSeparateMobile: Detail panel is in a separate window

inspector.title: PACKET INSPECTOR
inspector.noPacketData: No packet data for this step

community.title: Community Notes
community.noNotesTitle: No community notes for this step yet
community.noNotesDescription: Community notes are shared insights from other engineers studying this protocol flow. Be the first to contribute!
community.shareViaGithub: Share a Note via GitHub Discussions

eventDetail.notePlaceholder: Add your notes for this step...

chat.title: CHAT
chat.apiKeyStorage: Stored in localStorage. Sent only to api.anthropic.com.
chat.emptyHint: Ask about the current protocol step, packet fields, spec details, or anything RDMA/networking related.
chat.suggestStep: What is happening at this step?
chat.suggestRkey: What happens if the rkey is wrong?

about.tagline: Interactive protocol education platform for network engineers, students, and anyone curious about what happens on the wire.
about.disclaimer: Protocol descriptions are based on open-source implementations (Linux kernel, rdma-core) and public RFCs. Specification references are citations for further reading — no proprietary text has been reproduced.

troubleshooter.title: PCAP Troubleshooter
troubleshooter.uploadDescription: Upload a PCAP file or tshark JSON export to analyze protocol compliance. All parsing happens locally in your browser — nothing is uploaded to any server.
troubleshooter.pcapDescription: Standard packet capture (.pcap, .pcapng, .cap). Built-in dissectors for Ethernet, IPv4, TCP, UDP, and RoCEv2.
troubleshooter.tsharkDescription: Full protocol dissection via Wireshark. Supports 3000+ protocols.
troubleshooter.sensitiveDataWarning: — Payload bytes containing potential credentials or PII were found. Raw payload content is automatically excluded from AI chat context.
troubleshooter.scrubLabel: Scrub sensitive data (replace real IPs and MACs)

flowPicker.title: Select Network Flows
flowPicker.searchPlaceholder: Filter by name, IP, or protocol...
flowPicker.noMatchingFlows: No flows match the current filter.

traceChat.title: TRACE CHAT
traceChat.apiKeyStorage: Stored in localStorage. Sent only to api.anthropic.com.
traceChat.emptyHint: Ask about your trace — protocol issues, packet behavior, troubleshooting advice.
traceChat.suggestWrong: What went wrong in this trace?
traceChat.suggestRst: Why is there a TCP RST?
